# Velora — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Velora is an ambitious nationwide super app combining social networking, classified marketplace, and logistics services with enterprise-grade security. The platform features a multi-role ecosystem (buyers, sellers, merchants, drivers) with mandatory identity verification, AI-powered content moderation for safety, real-time GPS tracking, and an automated escrow payment system that splits funds between sellers, drivers, and the platform upon delivery confirmation.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://velora-bbf15589.zappy5.app
Velora combines secure marketplace, social networking, and logistics in one super app. IRS identity verification, AI moderation, and escrow payments protect every transaction nationwide.

### Trust & Security
https://velora-bbf15589.zappy5.app/security
Mandatory IRS verify identity checks, AI-powered content moderation, and automated escrow payments ensure safe transactions. See how Velora protects buyers, sellers, and drivers.

### Roles & Flows
https://velora-bbf15589.zappy5.app/roles
Discover how buyers, sellers, merchants, and drivers thrive on Velora. Real-time GPS tracking, verified identities, and automated payments power our nationwide network.

### Contact
https://velora-bbf15589.zappy5.app/contact
Ready to join the most secure marketplace platform in America? Contact Velora to learn about ID me verification, multi-role access, and enterprise solutions for your business.

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Velora
Velora is an ambitious nationwide super app combining social networking, classified marketplace, and logistics services with enterprise-grade security. The platform features a multi-role ecosystem (buyers, sellers, merchants, drivers) with mandatory identity verification, AI-powered content moderation for safety, real-time GPS tracking, and an automated escrow payment system that splits funds between sellers, drivers, and the platform upon delivery confirmation.

## Target Audience
buyers, sellers, merchants, and drivers across the USA

## Industry
technology/marketplace platform

---
